channel.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Container Operations

Security

  • KICSstars502 - an infrastructure-as-code scanning tool, find security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations early in the development cycle. Can be extended for additional policies. By Checkmarx

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Where to start

  • Practical Introduction to Container Terminology The landscape for container technologies is larger than just docker. Without a good handle on the terminology, It can be difficult to grasp the key differences between docker and (pick your favorites, CRI-O, rkt, lxc/lxd) or understand what the Open Container Initiative is doing to standardize container technology.
  • The Docker Handbook An open-source book that teaches you the fundamentals, best practices and some intermediate Docker functionalities. The book is hosted on fhsinchy/the-docker-handbookstars400 and the projects are hosted on fhsinchy/docker-handbook-projectsstars813 repository.

    • Docker Images

    Registry

  • Sonatype Nexus - Repository with Universal Support, also for Docker images

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Development with Docker

Serverless

  • Koyeb 💲 - Koyeb is a developer-friendly serverless platform to deploy apps globally. Seamlessly run Docker containers, web apps, and APIs with git-based deployment, native autoscaling, a global edge network, and built-in service mesh and discovery.

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Container Operations

CLI tools
  • docker pushrmstars58 - A Docker CLI plugin that lets you push the README.md file from the current directory to Docker Hub. Also supports Quay and Harbor. By @christian-korneck
  • docker-lsstars404 - CLI tools for browsing and manipulating docker registries by @mayflower

    • Good Tips

  • GUI Apps with Docker by @fgrehm

    • Raspberry Pi & ARM

  • Docker Pirates ARMed with explosive stuff Huge resource on clustering, swarm, docker, pre-installed image for SD card on Raspberry Pi

    • Container Operations

    Container Composition

  • podman-composestars1.8k - a script to run docker-compose.yml using podman by @containers
  • Smaltestars24 – Dynamically configure applications that require static configuration in docker container. By @roquie

    • Container Operations

    Monitoring

  • dockpromstars4.1k - Docker hosts and containers monitoring with Prometheus, Grafana, cAdvisor, NodeExporter and AlertManager by @stefanprodan

    • Container Operations

    Reverse Proxy

  • nginx-proxystars14.9k - Automated nginx proxy for Docker containers using docker-gen by @jwilder

    • Container Operations

    Terminal UI
  • DockSTARTerstars1.3k - DockSTARTer helps you get started with home server apps running in Docker by GhostWriters

    • Container Operations

    Web

  • Docker Registry UIstars893 - A web UI for easy private/local Docker Registry integration by @atcol

    • Docker Images

    Base Tools

  • suestars2 - Executes a program as a user different from the user running sue. This is a maintainable alternative to ncopa/su-exec, which is the better tianon/gosu. This one is far better (higher performance, smaller size), than the original gosu, however it is far easier to maintain, than su-exec, which is written in plain C. Made by @theAkito

    • Docker Images

    Registry

  • cleanregstars43 - A small tool to delete image manifests from a Docker Registry implementing the API v2, dereferencing them for the GC by @hcguersoy
  • Container Registry Service 💲 - Harbor based Container Management Solution as a Service for teams and organizations. Free tier offers 1 GB storage for private repositories.

    • Development with Docker

    Development Environment

  • DockerBuildManagementstars8 - Build Management is a python application, installed with pip. The application makes it easy to manage a build system based on Docker by configuring a single yaml file describing how to build, test, run or publish a containerized solution.

    • Development with Docker

    Garbage Collection

  • docker_gcstars44 - Image for automatic removing unused Docker Swarm objects. Also works just as Docker Service by @pdacity

    • Useful Resources

  • Docker Certification 💲 will help you to will Learn Docker containerization, running Docker containers, Image creation, Dockerfile, Docker orchestration, security best practices, and more through hands-on projects and case studies and helps to clear Docker Certified Associate.
  • Docker in Action, Second Edition
  • Docker in Practice, Second Edition
  • Docker Newsletter Docker newsletter for regular updates
  • Programming Community Curated Resources for learning Docker

item.description:

Other
  • dext-docker-registry-pluginstars2 - Search the Docker Registry with the Dext smart launcher. By @vutran
  • docker-sshstars573 - SSH Server for Docker containers ~ Because every container should be accessible. By @jeroenpeeters
  • dockercraftstars6.3k - Docker + Minecraft = Dockercraft by @docker
  • dockerfile-modestars415 An emacs mode for handling Dockerfiles by @spotify
  • MultiDockerstars27 - Create a secure multi-user Docker machine, where each user is segregated into an indepentent container.
  • Powerline-Dockerstars58 - A Powerline segment for showing the status of Docker containers by @adrianmo

    • Container Operations

    Terminal UI
  • lazydockerstars17.7k - The lazier way to manage everything docker. A simple terminal UI for both docker and docker-compose, written in Go with the gocui library. By @jesseduffield
  • senstars849 - 💀 Terminal user interface for docker engine, by @TomasTomecek

    • Container Operations

    CLI tools
  • captainstars172 - Easily start and stop docker compose projects from any directory. By @jenssegers
  • dockersqlstars113 - A command line interface to query Docker using SQL by @crosbymichael
  • ns-enterstars2.5k - 💀 no more ssh, enter name spaces of container by @jpetazzo

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Container Operations

IDE integrations

  • JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ IDEA, GoLand, WebStorm, CLion etc.) has built-in Docker plugin
  • Eclipse Docker Tooling plugin
  • docker.vimstars165 - Manage docker containers and images in Vim. By @skanehira
  • docker.elstars534 Manage docker from Emacs by @Silex

    • Container Operations

    Container Composition

  • Capitanstars21 - Composable docker orchestration with added scripting support by @byrnedo.

    • Container Operations

    Desktop

  • Docker Desktop - Official native app. Only for Windows and MacOS
  • Simple Docker UIstars556 - built on Electron. By @felixgborrego

    • Container Operations

    Terminal UI
  • dockdashstars95 detailed stats. By @byrnedo
  • docuistars2k - An interactive shell UI for managing Docker containers. Also works in Windows. By @skanehira

    • Container Operations

    Web

  • Admiralstars246 Admiral™ is a highly scalable and very lightweight Container Management platform for deploying and managing container based applications. By VMWare
  • netdatastars55k - Real-time performance monitoring

    • Docker Images

    Registry

  • Harborstars15.2k An open source trusted cloud native registry project that stores, signs, and scans content. Supports replication, user management, access control and activity auditing. By CNCF formerly VMWare

    • Awesome Lists

  • Awesome Composestars11.9k - Docker Compose samples

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Container Operations

Security

  • Sysdig Secure 💲 - Sysdig Secure addresses run-time security through behavioral monitoring and defense, and provides deep forensics based on open source Sysdig for incident response.

    • Where to start

  • Bootstrapping Microservices by Ashley Davis - A practical and project-based guide to building applications with microservices, starts by building a Docker image for a single microservice and publishing it to a private container registry, finishes by deploying a complete microservices application to a production Kubernetes cluster.

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Useful Resources

  • Learn Docker - Learn Docker - curated list of the top online docker tutorials and courses.

    • Docker Images

    Base Tools

  • su-execstars786 - This is a simple tool that will simply execute a program with different privileges. The program will be executed directly and not run as a child, like su and sudo does, which avoids TTY and signal issues. Why reinvent gosu? This does more or less exactly the same thing as gosu but it is only 10kb instead of 1.8MB. By ncopa

    • Services based on Docker (💲)

    CI Services

  • CircleCI 💲 - Push or pull Docker images from your build environment, or build and run containers right on CircleCI.
  • CodeFresh 💲 - Everything you need to build, test, and share your Docker applications. Provides automated end to end testing.
  • ConcourseCI 💲 - A CI SaaS platform for developers and DevOps teams pipeline oriented.
  • Shippable 💲 - A SaaS platform for developers and DevOps teams that significantly reduces the time taken for code to be built, tested and deployed to production.
  • TravisCI 💲 - A Free github projects continuous integration Saas platform for developers and Devops.

    • Services based on Docker (💲)

    CaaS

  • Amazon ECS 💲 - A management service on EC2 that supports Docker containers.
  • Azure AKS 💲 - Simplify Kubernetes management, deployment, and operations. Use a fully managed Kubernetes container orchestration service.
  • Cloud 66 💲 - Full-stack hosted container management as a service
  • Codenvy 💲 - One-click Docker environments and cloud workspace for development teams
  • Dockhero 💲 - Dockhero is a Heroku add-on which turns a Docker image into a microservice attached to the Heroku app. Currently in beta.
  • Google Container Engine 💲 - Docker containers on Google Cloud Computing powered by Kubernetes.
  • Jelastic Cloud 💲 - "Easy-to-use" container hosting platfrom with automatic vertical and horizontal scaling. Available over 50+ hosting providers worldwide.
  • OpenShift Dedicated 💲 - A hosted OpenShift cluster for running your Docker containers managed by Red Hat.
  • Sloppy.io 💲 - all-in-one solution for container deployment and hosting – made and hosted in Germany
  • Triton 💲 - Elastic container-native infrastructure by Joyent.

    • Services based on Docker (💲)

    Monitoring Services

  • AppDynamics 💲 - AppDynamics gives enterprises real-time insights into application performance, user performance, and business performance so they can move faster in an increasingly sophisticated, software-driven world.
  • Datadog 💲 - Datadog is a full-stack monitoring service for large-scale cloud environments that aggregates metrics/events from servers, databases, and applications. It includes support for Docker, Kubernetes, and Mesos.
  • Prometheus 💲 - Open-source service monitoring system and time series database
  • Site24x7 💲 - Docker Monitoring for DevOps and IT is a SaaS Pay per Host model
  • SPM for Dockerstars195 💲 - Monitoring of host and container metrics, Docker events and logs. Automatic log parser. Anomaly Detection and alerting for metrics and logs. @sematext
  • Sysdig Monitor 💲 - Sysdig Monitor can be used as either software or a SaaS service to monitor, alert, and troubleshoot containers using system calls. It has container-specific features for Docker and Kubernetes.

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Container Operations

Container Composition

  • bockerstars8.1k (1) 💀 - Docker implemented in 100 lines of bash by p8952
  • Composerizestars994 - Convert docker run commands into docker-compose files
  • crowdrstars84 - Tool for managing multiple Docker containers (docker-compose alternative) by @polonskiy
  • bockerstars123 (2) - Write Dockerfile completely in Bash. Extensible and simple. --> Reusable by @icy
  • boxstars238 - Build Dockerfile images with a mruby DSL, includes flattening and layer manipulation
  • elsystars71 - An opinionated, multi-language, build tool based on Docker and Docker Compose
  • Stackerstars61 - Docker Compose Templates. Stacker provides an abstraction layer over Docker Compose and a better DX (developer experience).

    • Container Operations

    Volume Management / Data

  • Docker Unisonstars166 A docker volume container using Unison for fast two-way folder sync. Created as an alternative to slow boot2docker volumes on OS X. By @leighmcculloch
  • REX-Raystars1.9k provides a vendor agnostic storage orchestration engine. The primary design goal is to provide persistent storage for Docker, Kubernetes, and Mesos. By@thecodeteam (DELL Technologies)
  • Convoystars1.3k - an open-source Docker volume driver that can snapshot, backup and restore Docker volumes anywhere. By @rancher
  • Docker Machine NFSstars794 Activates NFS for an existing boot2docker box created through Docker Machine on OS X.
  • portworx 💲 - Decentralized storage solution for persistent, shared and replicated volumes.
  • quobyte 💲 - fully fault-tolerant distributed file system with a docker volume driver

    • Container Operations

    Desktop

  • DockStationstars1.6k - A developer centric UI to configure, monitor, and manage services and containers @dock_station
  • Dockeronstars763 - A project built on Electron + Vue.js for Docker on desktop. @fluency03
  • Lifeboatstars177 - An easy way to launch Docker projects with a graphical interface on your Mac. @jplhomer

    • Container Operations

    Terminal UI
  • Docker-monstars777 💀 - Console-based Docker monitoring by @icecrime
  • ctop (1)stars413 - A command line / text based Linux Containers monitoring tool that works just like you expect (Python) by @yadutaf
  • ctop (2)stars11.5k - Top-like interface for container metrics (Golang) by @bcicen
  • docklystars2.8k - An interactive shell UI for managing Docker containers by @lirantal
  • drystars2.3k - An interactive CLI for Docker containers by @moncho

    • Container Operations

    CLI tools
  • wharfeestars646 - Autocompletion and syntax highlighting for Docker commands. by @j-bennet
  • DVMstars501 - Docker version manager by @howtowhale
  • scubastars59 - Transparently use Docker containers to encapsulate software build environments, by @JonathonReinhart
  • tsaotunstars49 - Python based Assistance for Docker by @qazbnm456

    • Docker Images

    Base Tools

  • dockerizestars4k - Utility to simplify running applications in docker containers by @jwilder
  • Chaperonestars171 - A single PID1 process designed for docker containers. Does user management, log management, startup, zombie reaping, all in one small package. by @garywiz
  • CoreOS - Linux for Massive Server Deployments
  • docker-genstars3.8k - Generate files from docker container meta-data by @jwilder
  • GoSustars3.7k - Run this specific application as this specific user and get out of the pipeline (entrypoint script tool) by @tianon
  • is-dockerstars133 - Check if the process is running inside a Docker container by @sindresorhusstars164.9k
  • supercronicstars918 - crontab-compatible job runner, designed specifically to run in containers by @aptible
  • TrivialRCstars28 - A minimalistic Runtime Configuration system and process manager for containers @vorakl

    • Docker Images

    Linter

  • dockfmtstars369 🚧 - Dockerfile formatter and parser by @jessfraz
  • Whale-linterstars34 - A simple and small Dockerfile linter written in Python3+ without dependencies by @jeromepin

    • Docker Images

    Registry

  • Docketstars688 - Custom docker registry that allows for lightning fast deploys through bittorrent by @netvarun
  • CargoOSstars7 - A bare essential OS for running the Docker Engine on bare metal or Cloud. By @RedCoolBeans
  • Docker Hub provided by Docker Inc.
  • Docker Registry v2stars6.2k - The Docker toolset to pack, ship, store, and deliver content
  • TreeScale - Build and Distribute container based applications. By @tigranbs

    • Development with Docker

    API Client

  • dockerfile-mavenstars2.5k - A Maven plugin for building and pushing Docker images by @spotify
  • sbt-dockerstars695 - Create Docker images directly from sbt by @marcuslonnberg
  • ahabstars136 - Docker event handling with Python by @instacart
  • Docker Client for JVMstars84 - A Docker remote api client library for the JVM, written in Groovy by @gesellix
  • Docker Client TypeScript - Docker API client for JavaScript, automatically generated from Swagger API definition from moby repository. By @masaeedu
  • docker-it-scalastars427 - Docker integration testing kit with Scala by @whisklabs
  • docker-maven-pluginstars1.5k - A Maven plugin for running and creating Docker images by @fabric8io
  • Docker-PowerShellstars278 - PowerShell Module for Docker
  • Docker.DotNetstars1.4k - C#/.NET HTTP client for the Docker remote API by @ahmetalpbalkan
  • dockerodestars3.2k - Docker Remote API node.js module by @apocas
  • DoMonitstars67 - A simple Docker Monitoring wrapper For Docker API
  • go-dockerclientstars1.8k - Go HTTP client for the Docker remote API by @fsouza
  • Gradle Docker pluginstars79 - A Docker remote api plugin for Gradle by @gesellix
  • libcomposestars590 - Go library for Docker Compose.
  • sbt-docker-composestars168 - Integrates Docker Compose functionality into sbt by @kurtkopchik

    • Development with Docker

    Development Environment

  • docker-vmstars33 - Simple and transparent alternative to boot2docker (backed by Vagrant) by @shyiko
  • Bincistars671 - Containerize your development workflow. (formerly DevLab by @TechnologyAdvice)
  • construistars23 - Run your builds inside a Docker defined environment by @lstephen
  • Devstepstars200 💀 - Development environments powered by Docker and buildpacks by @fgrehm
  • Dinghystars2.1k - An alternative way to use Docker on Mac OS X using Docker Machine with virtualbox, vmware, xhyve or parallels
  • Docker Missing Toolsstars18 - A set of bash commands to shortcut typical docker dev-ops. An alternative to creating typical helper scripts like "build.sh" and "deploy.sh" inside code repositories. By @NandoQuintana.
  • forward2dockerstars74 💀 - Utility to auto forward a port from localhost into ports on Docker containers running in a boot2docker VM by @bsideup
  • Vaggastars1.7k - Vagga is a containerisation tool without daemons. It is a fully-userspace container engine inspired by Vagrant and Docker, specialized for development environments by @tailhook

    • Development with Docker

    Testing

  • Dockunitstars43 💀 - Docker based integration tests. A simple Node based utility for running Docker based unit tests. By @dockunit
  • Pumbastars2k - Chaos testing tool for Docker. Can be deployed on kubernetes and CoreOS cluster. By @alexei-led
  • dgoss - A fast YAML based tool for validating docker containers.
  • DockerSpecstars183 - A small Ruby Gem to run RSpec and Serverspec, Infrataster and Capybara tests against Dockerfiles or Docker images easily. By @zuazo
  • InSpecstars2.3k - InSpec is an open-source testing framework for infrastructure with a human- and machine-readable language for specifying compliance, security and policy requirements. By @chef

    • Good Tips

  • Dealing with linked containers dependency in docker-compose by @rochacbruno
  • Don't Repeat Yourself with Anchors, Aliases and Extensions in Docker Compose Files by @King Chung Huang

    • Brazilian

  • Docker BR on Telegram
  • Docker BR on Slack - Auto invite url

    • English

  • Docker Events
  • Docker Community
  • Docker On Line Meetup
  • Docker Reddit Community

    • Where to start (Windows)

  • Docker on Windows behind a firewall by @kaitoedter
  • Docker with Microsoft SQL 2016 + ASP.NET Demonstration running ASP.NET and SQL Server workloads in Docker

    • Container Operations

    Deployment and Infrastructure

  • Centurionstars1.7k - Centurion is a mass deployment tool for Docker fleets. It takes containers from a Docker registry and runs them on a fleet of hosts with the correct environment variables, host volume mappings, and port mappings. By @newrelic
  • Conduitstars106 - Experimental deployment system for Docker by @ehazlett
  • deploystars51 💀 - Git and Docker deployment tool. A middle ground between simple Docker composition tools and full blown cluster orchestration by @ttiny
  • dockitstars106 💀 - Do docker actions and Deploy gluster containers! By @humblec
  • Longshoremanstars424 💀 - Longshoreman automates application deployment using Docker. Just create a Docker repository (or use a service), configure the cluster using AWS or Digital Ocean (or whatever you like) and deploy applications using a Heroku-like CLI tool. By longshoreman

    • Container Operations

    Monitoring

  • Docker-Alertdstars89 - Monitor and send alerts based on docker container resource usage/statistics
  • Dockeranastars203 💀 - packaged version of Graphite and Grafana, specifically targeted at metrics from Docker.
  • InfluxDB, cAdvisor, Grafanastars447 - InfluxDB Time series DB in combination with Grafana and cAdvisor by @vegasbrianc
  • LogJamstars133 - Logjam is a log forwarder designed to listen on a local port, receive log entries over UDP, and forward these messages on to a log collection server (such as logstash) by @gocardless
  • Logspoutstars4.3k - Log routing for Docker container logs by @gliderlabs
  • Out-of-the-box Host/Container Monitoring/Logging/Alerting Stackstars486 - Docker host and container monitoring, logging and alerting out of the box using cAdvisor, Prometheus, Grafana for monitoring, Elasticsearch, Kibana and Logstash for logging and elastalert and Alertmanager for alerting. Set up in 5 Minutes. Secure mode for production use with built-in Automated Nginx Reverse Proxy (jwilder's)stars14.9k.
  • Zabbix Docker modulestars1.1k - Zabbix module that provides discovery of running containers, CPU/memory/blk IO/net container metrics. Systemd Docker and LXC execution driver is also supported. It's a dynamically linked shared object library, so its performance is (~10x) better, than any script solution.
  • Zabbix Dockerstars47 - Monitor containers automatically using zabbix LLD feature.

    • Container Operations

    Networking

  • Flannelstars6.5k - Flannel is a virtual network that gives a subnet to each host for use with container runtimes. By @coreos
  • netshootstars3.1k - The netshoot container has a powerful set of networking tools to help troubleshoot Docker networking issues by @nicolaka

    • Container Operations

    Orchestration

  • athenastars84 - An automation platform with a plugin architecture that allows you to easily create and share services.
  • blimpstars22 💀 - Uses Docker Machine to easily move a container from one Docker host to another, show containers running against all of your hosts, replicate a container across multiple hosts and more by @defermat and @schvin
  • clusterdockstars25 - Docker container orchestration to enable the testing of long-running cluster deployments
  • Cranestars736 - Control plane based on docker built-in swarm @Dataman-Cloud
  • gantrydstars268 💀 - A framework for easy management of docker-based components across machines by @DevTable
  • Havenstars230 - Haven is a simplified container management platform that integrates container, application, cluster, image, and registry managements. By @codeabovelab
  • Kubernetesstars77k - Open source orchestration system for Docker containers by Google
  • ManageIQstars1.1k - Discover, optimize and control your hybrid IT. By ManageIQ
  • Mantlstars3k - Mantl is a modern platform for rapidly deploying globally distributed services
  • Nebula - A Docker orchestration tool designed to manage massive scale distributed clusters.
  • Rancherstars17.1k - An open source project that provides a complete platform for operating Docker in production by @rancher.

    • Container Operations

    PaaS

  • Atlantisstars388 💀 - Atlantis is an Open Source PaaS for HTTP applications built on Docker and written in Go
  • Convox Rackstars1.8k - Convox Rack is open source PaaS built on top of expert infrastructure automation and devops best practices.
  • Dcwstars12 - Docker-compose SSH wrapper: a very poor man PaaS, exposing the docker-compose and custom-container commands defined in container labels.
  • Empirestars2.6k - A PaaS built on top of Amazon EC2 Container Service (ECS)
  • Flynnstars7.9k - A next generation open source platform as a service
  • Nanoboxstars1.5k 💲 - An application development platform that creates local environments that can then be deployed and scaled in the cloud.
  • Tsurustars3.6k - Tsuru is an extensible and open source Platform as a Service software

    • Container Operations

    Reverse Proxy

  • docker-proxystars249 💀 - Transparent proxy for docker containers, run in a docker container. By @silarsis
  • fabiostars6.7k - A fast, modern, zero-conf load balancing HTTP(S) router for deploying microservices managed by consul. By @magiconair (Frank Schroeder)
  • h2o-proxystars44 💀 - Automated H2O reverse proxy for Docker containers. An alternative to jwilder/nginx-proxystars14.9k by @zchee
  • Træfɪkstars33.6k - Automated reverse proxy and load-balancer for Docker, Mesos, Consul, Etcd... By @EmileVauge

    • Container Operations

    Security

  • Aqua Security 💲 - Securing container-based applications from Dev to Production on any platform
  • CIS Docker Benchmarkstars339 - This InSpecstars2.3k compliance profile implement the CIS Docker 1.12.0 Benchmark in an automated way to provide security best-practice tests around Docker daemon and containers in a production environment. By @dev-sec
  • docker-bench-securitystars6.7k - script that checks for dozens of common best-practices around deploying Docker containers in production. By @docker
  • notarystars2.6k - a server and a client for running and interacting with trusted collections. By @TUF

    • Container Operations

    Service Discovery

  • docker-consulstars1.1k by @progrium
  • istiostars27.3k - An open platform to connect, manage, and secure microservices by @IstioMesh
  • proxystars51 💀 - lightweight nginx based load balancer self using service discovery provided by registrator. by @factorish
  • registratorstars4.5k - Service registry bridge for Docker by @gliderlabs and @progrium

    • Container Operations

    Web

  • Docker Registry Browserstars247 - Web Interface for the Docker Registry HTTP API v2 by @klausmeyer
  • docker-registry-webstars486 - Web UI, authentication service and event recorder for private docker registry v2 by @mkuchin
  • docker-swarm-visualizerstars2.9k - Visualizes Docker services on a Docker Swarm (for running demos).
  • dockering-on-railsstars19 💀 - Simple Web-Interface for Docker with a lot of features by @Electrofenster
  • OctoLinkerstars4.7k - A browser extension for GitHub that makes the image name in a Dockerfile clickable and redirect you to the related Docker Hub page.
  • Portainerstars18k - A lightweight management UI for managing your Docker hosts or Docker Swarm clusters by @portainer
  • Rapid Dashboardstars118 - A simple query dashboard to use Docker Remote API by @ozlerhakan
  • Seagullstars1.9k - Friendly Web UI to monitor docker daemon. by @tobegit3hub

    • Docker Images

    Builder

  • container-factorystars56 - Produces Docker images from tarballs of application source code by @mutable
  • copy-docker-imagestars29 - Copy a Docker image between registries without a full Docker installation by @mdlavin
  • Derrickstars583 - A tool help you to automate the generation of Dockerfile and dockerize application by scanning the code. By @alibaba.
  • docker-companionstars33 - A command line tool written in Golang to squash and unpack docker images by @mudler
  • docker-makestars84 - Build, tag,and push a bunch of related docker images via a single command.
  • docker-replaystars171 - Generate docker runcommand and options from running containers. By bcicen
  • DockerSlimstars10.2k shrinks fat Docker images creating the smallest possible images.
  • Docklystars213 - Dockly is a gem made to ease the pain of packaging an application in Docker by @swipely
  • dockrampstars266 💀 - Proof of Concept: A Client Driven Docker Image Builder by @jlhawn
  • portainerstars130 - Apache Mesos framework for building Docker images by @duedil-ltd
  • SkinnyWhalestars180 💀 - Skinnywhale helps you make smaller (as in megabytes) Docker containers.
  • Whalesstars320 - A tool to automatically dockerize your applications by @icalialabs.

    • Docker Images

    Dockerfile

  • chaperone-dockerstars60 - A set of images using the Chaperone process manager, including a lean Alpine image, LAMP, LEMP, and bare-bones base kits.
  • Vektorcloud - A collection of minimal, Alpine-based Docker images

    • Docker Images

    Metadata

  • opencontainer - A convention and shared namespace for Docker labels defined by OCI Image Spec.

    • Development with Docker

    CI/CD

  • Captainstars743 - Convert your Git workflow to Docker containers ready for Continuous Delivery by @harbur.
  • Docker plugin for Jenkinsstars454 - The aim of the docker plugin is to be able to use a docker host to dynamically provision a slave, run a single build, then tear-down that slave.
  • Dronestars23.1k - Continuous integration server built on Docker and configured using YAML files.
  • Microservices Continuous Deploymentstars141 - Continuous deployment of a microservices application.
  • mustars947 - Tool to configure CI/CD of your container applications via AWS CodePipeline, CodeBuild and ECS @Stelligent
  • Skipperstars31 - Easily dockerize your Git repository by @Stratoscale
  • SwarmCIstars47 - Create a distributed, isolated task pipeline in your Docker Swarm.

    • Development with Docker

    Garbage Collection

  • caducstars15 - A docker garbage collector cleaning stuff you did not use recently
  • docker-garbystars36 - Docker garbage collection script by @konstruktoid.

    • Development with Docker

    Serverless

  • Docker-Lambdastars5.5k - Docker images and test runners that replicate the live AWS Lambda environment. By @lamb-ci
  • Funkerstars19 - Functions as Docker containers example voting app. By @bfirsh
  • IronFunctionsstars2.9k - The serverless microservices platform FaaS (Funcitons as a Service) which uses Docker containers to run Any language or AWS Lambda functions
  • OpenFaaSstars19.7k - A complete serverless functions framework for Docker and Kubernetes. By OpenFaaS
  • SCARstars560 - Serverless Container-aware Architectures (SCAR) is a serverless framework that allows easy deployment and execution of containers (e.g. Docker) in Serverless environments (e.g. Lambda) by @grycap

    • Development with Docker

    Wrappers

  • Belugastars165 💀 - CLI to deploy docker containers on a single server or low amount of servers. By @cortextmedia
  • dexecstars316 - Command line interface written in Go for running code with Docker Exec images.
  • udockerstars827 - A tool to execute simple docker containers in batch or interactive systems without root privileges by @inidigo-dc

    • Useful Resources

  • Cloud Native Landscapestars7.5k

    • Awesome Lists

  • Awesome Kubernetesstars11.7k by @ramitsurana
  • Awesome Linux Containerstars1.1k more general about container than this repo, by @Friz-zy.
  • Awesome Sysadminstars11.8k by @n1trux
  • ToolsOfTheTradestars15.2k a list of SaaS and On premise applications by @cjbarber

    • Raspberry Pi & ARM

  • Get Docker up and running on the RaspberryPi in three steps

    • Security

  • Bringing new security features to Docker
  • CVE Scanning Alpine images with Multi-stage builds in Docker 17.05stars9 by @tomwillfixit
  • Docker Security Cheat Sheet
  • Docker Security: Are Your Containers Tightly Secured to the Ship? SlideShare
  • How CVE's are handled on Offical Docker Images
  • Lynis is an open source security auditing tool including Docker auditing
  • Security Best Practices for Building Docker Images
  • Tuning Docker with the newest security enhancements

    • Videos

  • Contributing to Docker by Andrew "Tianon" Page (InfoSiftr) (34:31)
  • Deploying and scaling applications with Docker, Swarm, and a tiny bit of Python magic (3:11:06) by @jpetazzo
  • Docker and SELinux by Daniel Walsh from Red Hat (40:23)
  • Docker in Production by @jpetazzo (36:05)
  • Extending Docker with Plugins (15:21)
  • From Local Docker Development to Production Deployments by @jpetazzo @ AWS re:Invent 2015
  • Immutable Infrastructure with Docker and EC2 by Michael Bryzek (Gilt) (42:04)
  • Introduction to Docker and containers (3:09:00) by @jpetazzo
  • Performance Analysis of Docker - Jeremy Eder (1:36:58)
  • Scalable Microservices with Kubernetes Free Udacity course
  • State of containers: a debate with CoreOS, VMware and Google (27:38)

    • Chinese

  • DockerOne Docker Community (in Chinese) by @LiYingJie

    • Russian

  • Docker Russian-speaking Community

item.title: veggiemonk/awesome-docker Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
Legend

  • Abandoned 💀
  • Beta 🚧
  • Monetized 💲
